added: New install experience — run `soma` and it introduces itself. Typing animation, rotating concepts, interactive Q&A.
`soma focus <keyword>` — start a session primed for a topic. Relevant content loads hotter.
`soma --map <name>` — load a workflow template with pre-configured tools and protocols.
MAP system — reusable workflow templates that chain scripts, muscles, and protocols together.
Muscle trigger engine — muscles auto-activate when focus keywords match their tags.
13 bundled scripts — codebase navigation, memory tracing, session focus, plan management, and more.
23 documentation pages — models, keybindings, themes, settings, sessions, prompts, skills, extending.
30 automated E2E tests verify branding, paths, models, and infrastructure.
Personality engine — 22 Q&A topics, every answer different. Ask about memory, heat, compaction, or how Soma compares.
Scratch notes persist across sessions with `/scratch`.
changed: Engine updated to 0.61.0 — keybinding manager, JSONL export/import, session forking, lazy provider loading.
License: BSL 1.1 — source-available, converts to MIT on 2027-09-18.
npm package is now a lightweight launcher. Runtime downloads separately via `soma init`.

added: `/scan-logs` — search previous tool calls and results across sessions.
`/scrape` — intelligent doc discovery and scraping from URLs.
Session warnings — tool usage stats from previous session shown on boot.
Scratch notes — timestamped notes that persist across sessions.
Grace period setting — configurable delay before auto-breathe rotates.
Guard v2 — require reading relevant muscles before dangerous commands.
changed: System prompt trimmed ~19% — less noise, same intelligence.

added: Capability router for inter-extension communication. Extensions can provide and consume capabilities, emit and listen for signals.
Session rotation via signal file. Auto-breathe can now rotate into a fresh context without command context.
Per-session log files with auto-incrementing names. No more overwrites across rotations.
Resume boot diffing. Restarting a session skips redundant preload injection.
Restart-required detection. When you edit core files, the statusline shows a restart indicator.
Changelog pipeline. Generate categorized entries from commits, parse into JSON for the website.
Chain-of-thought tracing tool for blog seeds across session logs.
Self-analysis command. Muscle health checks, cross-location divergence, orphan detection.
Tool gates. Require reading relevant muscles before dangerous bash commands.
Grace period setting for auto-breathe. Configurable delay before rotation.
Scratch notes. Session IDs, date sections, active/done/parked status, auto-inject into context.
Polyglot script discovery. Scripts in .sh, .py, .ts, .js, .mjs all get picked up.
Periodic auto-commit every 5th turn for crash resilience.
changed: Auto-breathe rotation is immediate when preload exists. No more waiting for a turn that may not fire.
Self-awareness protocols consolidated. Five redundant protocols became configuration guides.
Scratch extracted to its own extension.

added: Auto-breathe mode. Proactive context management that triggers wrap-up at configurable thresholds and auto-rotates at higher ones.
Identity chain. Layered identity from project, parent, and global .soma/ directories.
Heat system. Protocols and muscles have temperature scores that rise with use and decay with neglect.
Protocol loading by heat. Hot protocols load in full, warm ones load a summary, cold ones skip.
Preload system. The agent writes a briefing for its next self before rotating. Not a summary. A letter.
Context warnings at 50%, 70%, 80%. Auto-exhale at 85%.
Muscle discovery by keywords. Focus scoring matches muscles to the current task.
Settings cascade. Project overrides parent overrides global. Only set what you want to change.
9 core modules: discovery, identity, heat, muscles, protocols, settings, preload, prompt, utils.
changed: System prompt compiled fresh each boot from identity + protocols + muscles + context.

added: Compiled system prompt. Identity, protocols, muscles, scripts assembled into one coherent prompt at boot.
7 extensions: boot, breathe, guard, header, route, scratch, statusline.
Protocol and muscle frontmatter with heat scores, tags, domains.
Recursive content discovery. Subdirectories for organized AMPS content.
Global ~/.soma/ directory with shared identity and settings.
Content installation from the community hub.
changed: Moved from single CLAUDE.md to layered AMPS system.
Scripts seeded on soma init instead of manual setup.

added: Auto-init on first soma run. Creates .soma/, detects project stack.
/inhale and /breathe commands for session continuation.
Context warnings at configurable thresholds.
Hub content installation with dependency resolution.
Extension scaffolding during init.
Protocols and Heat System — behavioral rules loaded by temperature, heat rises through use, decays through neglect
Muscle loading at boot — sorted by heat, loaded within configurable token budget
Settings chain — `settings.json` with resolution: project → parent → global
Mid-session heat tracking — auto-detects protocol usage from tool results
Domain scoping — `applies-to` frontmatter + `detectProjectSignals()`
Breath cycle commands — `/exhale`, `/inhale`, `/pin`, `/kill`
Script awareness — boot surfaces `.soma/scripts/` inventory
9 core modules — discovery, identity, protocols, muscles, settings, init, preload, utils, index
